hero.subtitle: B.K.S.B High School provides a nurturing environment where academic excellence meets character development. Join a legacy of success established in 2002.

footer.description: Established in 2002, BKSB High School is committed to providing quality education and fostering moral values in Kastashinga, Jamalpur.
footer.copyright: © 2023 B.K.S.B High School. All Rights Reserved.

applyForm.title: Application Form
applyForm.subtitle: Admissions for
applyForm.description: Please fill out the form below carefully to apply for admission.

headmaster.heading: A Foundation for Life
headmaster.paragraph1: Welcome to B.K.S.B High School. We are committed to a standard of excellence that balances academic achievement with moral discipline. We believe that true education involves training the mind and the character in equal measure. Here, we push our students to reach their highest potential while instilling the values that define a life well-lived.
headmaster.paragraph2: Situated in Kastashinga, Jamalpur, we have been serving the community since 2002, consistently delivering outstanding results and shaping the leaders of tomorrow.
headmaster.name: Topon Kumar Dey
headmaster.title: Headmaster, B.K.S.B High School

about.heading: A Tradition of Excellence
about.paragraph: B.K.S.B High School is more than just a place of learning; it is a community dedicated to the pursuit of knowledge. Our modern campus features state-of-the-art laboratories, a vast library, and digital classrooms designed to meet the challenges of the 21st century.

activitiesSection.heading: Co-curricular Activities
activitiesSection.description: We nurture talent through a diverse range of clubs and activities designed to build confidence and skills.

cta.title: Apply to BKSB
cta.description: Admissions are open for the upcoming academic session.

whyBKSB.heading: Why BKSB?
whyBKSB.subheading: Comprehensive support for every student's journey

scholarships.title: Scholarships
scholarships.description: Merit-based scholarships available for outstanding academic performers.

financialAid.title: Financial Aid
financialAid.description: Supporting deserving students with financial assistance programs.
